user_outcome: A release operator can prove every S02-authored semantic path is restored mode-for-mode and object-for-object to the pre-S02 tree before replacement work begins.
rationale: S02 received a final Implementer maintainability PASS and then failed fresh verification on a semantic Gate-3 defect. Baton forbids reopening that frozen boundary. This mandatory ordinary rollback restores the complete authored semantic envelope to S02's immutable start tree while preserving every release record, so corrected functionality can be introduced under a fresh slice id. A fresh verifier then BLOCKED because the executable historical proof was not named as the contract-owned integration test; the one planner-ratified post-start S19 spec amendment is bounded by proof/contract-amendment.json and must be enforced by the repaired checker, never treated as a general mutable-spec waiver.
in_scope: Derive every first-parent non-merge authored semantic path from S02's immutable start_commit e61cb190736ee7483fb4ed1a993442b26ce3574c through this rollback slice's pinned maintainability.implementation_head, including the original interval, gaps, rollback-authored files, generated files, and lockfiles.

Exclude only the physical docs/release/2026-07-15-baton-v0.15-conformance/ release-record root and recognized merge-only contributions; authored/merge overlap, unexpected later ordinary authority, or any other provenance ambiguity fails closed rather than narrowing the envelope.

Restore every envelope path's exact Git mode and blob identity, including absence, to the S02 start tree c57285e3f652e5f49aa8bb15e3ba65249b4a3db8. For the currently known 45-path envelope, 37 paths restore their exact start blobs and eight S02-added paths are absent.

Preserve the complete append-only S02 release history, including reports, claim, receipt, proof, journal, Verifier failure, deferred terminal status, and rollback link; do not revert or cherry-pick commits that would rewrite release-record topology.

Treat the committed docs/release/2026-07-15-baton-v0.15-conformance/S19-s02-v015-rollback/proof/check-rollback.sh as the required executable integration proof for this historical rollback. A fresh Verifier must run it against live T1 Git history at 4b38887e666f7e4ab664bac4780535b080ad54eb with --require-maintainability and --require-proof-bundle, exercise its named fail-closed cases with disposable adversarial Git objects, and after recording an independent PASS run it with --require-fresh-verifier.

Repair the committed checker so its release-record allowlist retains the original S19 lifecycle/proof records and admits exactly one post-S19-start planner-ratified transition of docs/release/2026-07-15-baton-v0.15-conformance/S19-s02-v015-rollback/spec.json: the before and after blobs, trigger, pre-ratification release-wt head, required planner commit subject, evidence path, and verification procedure are fixed by proof/contract-amendment.json validated against proof/contract-amendment-v1.schema.json. Any other post-start S19 spec blob, path, transition, or provenance remains fail-closed; S02 release records remain immutable.
Produce committed live equality evidence, full uncached build/test/vet results, a proof bundle, final Implementer maintainability PASS, and an independent fresh Verifier PASS before S20 begins.
out_of_scope: Reapplying Baton v0.15.1 parity, installer, schema-carrier, or doctor behavior belongs to S20-v015-parity-portable-fixture.
Repairing or weakening the failed S02 proof, report ledger, replacement claim/receipt, or Verifier verdict is prohibited.
Post-sync rollback and the reusable C-09 product implementation remain owned by S12-rollback-readiness.

Adding, relying on, or retaining a persistent non-release test file, CI workflow, CI hook, source package, or harness for this historical proof is prohibited: AC-02 and AC-04 require the non-release tree to be exactly equal to the S02 start tree. Disposable adversarial Git objects created only by the fresh Verifier are required evidence, not a persistent harness.

effort_complexity.rationale: The change is a broad but mechanically exact 45-path restoration; the acceptance boundary is fixed by immutable Git modes, blobs, absences, and a no-subtraction envelope.

risks.description: A rollback-authored, generated, or gap path escapes the envelope and survives with non-baseline identity.
risks.mitigation: Recompute first-parent non-merge authored history through the final rollback implementation head and compare every path mode/blob/absence to e61cb190.

risks.description: A broad Git revert rewrites or deletes S02's append-only release evidence.
risks.mitigation: Restore semantic paths explicitly while excluding only docs/release/2026-07-15-baton-v0.15-conformance/ and recognized merge-only contributions.

risks.description: Replacement begins while the original remains not C-09-ready or the rollback is not freshly verified.
risks.mitigation: Keep S20-v015-parity-portable-fixture ordered after this slice and block it until the rollback is verified and the original's immutable rollback link resolves tree-equal.

acceptance_criteria.text: WHEN a fresh Verifier evaluates S19 from the live T1-foundation Git history at implementation head 4b38887e666f7e4ab664bac4780535b080ad54eb THE SYSTEM SHALL run docs/release/2026-07-15-baton-v0.15-conformance/S19-s02-v015-rollback/proof/check-rollback.sh --head 4b38887e666f7e4ab664bac4780535b080ad54eb --require-maintainability --require-proof-bundle and derive every first-parent non-merge authored semantic path from S02 start_commit e61cb190736ee7483fb4ed1a993442b26ce3574c through that head, including gaps and rollback-authored/generated/lock paths, while excluding only the physical release root plus recognized merge-only contributions (C-09, N-07, N-09).

WHEN the required executable integration proof compares the complete ordinary rollback envelope at implementation head 4b38887e666f7e4ab664bac4780535b080ad54eb THE SYSTEM SHALL prove every mode, blob OID, and expected absence exactly equals the S02 start tree c57285e3f652e5f49aa8bb15e3ba65249b4a3db8, including absence of all eight S02-added paths, and SHALL reject any persistent non-release CI or test harness because the non-release tree itself is the exact equality invariant (C-09, N-07, N-09).

IF a fresh Verifier introduces a disposable adversarial Git object representing blob or mode drift, a surviving S02-added path, unrecognized merge provenance or parent-two drift, authored/merge overlap, unexpected later ordinary authority, or absent fresh-verifier evidence THEN docs/release/2026-07-15-baton-v0.15-conformance/S19-s02-v015-rollback/proof/check-rollback.sh SHALL exit non-zero without narrowing the envelope, changing release refs, or treating S02 as integration-ready (C-09, N-07, N-09).
test_refs: docs/release/2026-07-15-baton-v0.15-conformance/S19-s02-v015-rollback/proof/check-rollback.sh --head <adversarial-descendant-commit> --require-maintainability --require-proof-bundle (each named adversarial Git-object case exits non-zero)

acceptance_criteria.text: WHEN the repaired checker examines records changed after S19 start_commit 640396fa8cc319229d6f96dedfdbef65dbe317fe THE SYSTEM SHALL preserve every S02 release record byte-for-byte, preserve the original S19 lifecycle/proof allowlist, and admit docs/release/2026-07-15-baton-v0.15-conformance/S19-s02-v015-rollback/spec.json only when its complete reachable post-start blob-transition history is exactly the one planner-ratified before-to-after transition recorded in proof/contract-amendment.json and validated by proof/contract-amendment-v1.schema.json; any other post-start S19 spec change, provenance, or release-record change SHALL fail closed, and no unrelated non-release semantic difference from the S02 start tree is permitted (N-07, N-09).

WHEN the repaired checker has passed against live Git history, rejected every AC-03 adversarial Git-object case, and the fresh Verifier has independently recorded PASS THE SYSTEM SHALL require docs/release/2026-07-15-baton-v0.15-conformance/S19-s02-v015-rollback/proof/check-rollback.sh --head 4b38887e666f7e4ab664bac4780535b080ad54eb --require-fresh-verifier to pass, leave S02 as a C-09-valid rollback-backed terminal deferral, and only then permit S20-v015-parity-portable-fixture to start; before that point the replacement remains blocked (C-09, N-07, N-09).
